description: Foundation CSS off-canvas page layout wrapper that provides the structural shell for the off-canvas navigation panel and the main page content region.

stories.name: Default
stories.description: Off-canvas wrapper with placeholder main content and no side panel

stories.name: WithOffCanvasPanel
stories.description: Off-canvas wrapper with a navigation panel and main content

notes: Pure layout container — accepts arbitrary children. This is the Foundation CSS off-canvas pattern. The root div has class 'off-canvas-wrapper'. Inside is a div with classes 'inner-wrap off-canvas-wrapper-inner' and id='inner-wrap' plus data-off-canvas-wrapper attribute. The aside.off-canvas has id='left-off-canvas-menu', classes 'left-off-canvas-menu position-left', role='complementary', data-off-canvas and data-transition='overlap' attributes. The .off-canvas-content div has data-off-canvas-content attribute. There is also an empty right aside: id='right-off-canvas-menu' class='off-canvas right-off-canvas-menu position-right'.
